notes: 7G7 item 6. Maze family rotation: go-mazekit (7G2) is DFS-generation + BFS shortest path; this is Kruskal/union-find generation + right-hand wall-follower raw trace — different generator and different solver per the wave rotation law. Pinned renders and traces for (5x4,seed1),(6x5,seed42),(4x4,seed7),(2x2,seed3) computed by an independent Python oracle; UF internals deliberately unpinned (tests compare find() results only for equality), since Kruskal's accept/reject sequence is connectivity-determined regardless of UF implementation.
